commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Charmi, the great-grandson of Juda, by Zara and Zamri, Josue vii. 1.
Junius takes him to be the same with Calubi, (chap. ii.) father of Sobal. This seems to be transcribed from another ancient register of the family of Juda, and designed to show where the principal men had resided. (Calmet)
Only the chiefs are specified. (Du Hamel)
